title: kunzia glandulosa
intro: Kunzia glandulosa, also known as glandular Kunzia or glandular Kunzie, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of salicylic acid. The health benefits of Kunzia glandulosa include treating skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Kunzia glandulosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
